_comment: Example .claude/settings.json 'hooks' block for the Priming Stream bridge. Copy the 'hooks' object into your project's .claude/settings.json. The hooks run via 'python -m priming_stream.hooks.<name>', which requires the Priming Stream package to be installed first ('pip install -e .' from the repo root). Each hook reads a JSON event from stdin and writes a JSON result to stdout. The hooks only read the active graph and write to the episodic log; they never write graph.db.
